description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). BuildingTech Solutions has hired a new overnight cleaning service, 'Sparkle Sweep', and you must provision their access. Create a Time Profile named 'Overnight Cleaning' with a schedule active Monday through Sunday from 22:00 to 04:00. Create a User Group named 'Cleaning Crew' and add two new users: Elena Rostova (Company: 'Sparkle Sweep', RFID Card: '0009911223') and Mateo Cruz (Company: 'Sparkle Sweep', RFID Card: '0009911224'), both assigned to the 'Cleaning Crew' group. Save a summary text file containing the names of the two new users and their corresponding card numbers to ~/Documents/cleaning_crew_setup.txt.
